data.name: Dr. Sarah Mitchell
data.title: Global Head of Transportation
data.bio: Dr. Sarah Mitchell is an internationally recognized expert in transportation engineering with over 25 years of experience. She leads our global transportation practice, overseeing major rail, highway, and airport projects worldwide. Sarah is passionate about sustainable mobility and has pioneered several innovative approaches to integrated transport planning.
qualifications: MEng Civil Engineering, Imperial College London
Fellow of the Institution of Civil Engineers
achievements: Led design of 3 major metro systems across Middle East and Asia
Board member of Women in Rail

data.name: James Chen
data.title: Technical Director - Water Infrastructure
data.bio: James Chen is a leading water infrastructure specialist with expertise in large-scale water and wastewater systems. He has delivered some of Asia's most complex water projects, including deep tunnel sewers and water treatment facilities. James is known for his innovative hydraulic designs and commitment to sustainable water management.
qualifications: BSc Civil Engineering, University of Melbourne
achievements: Project director for $5 billion deep tunnel sewerage system

data.name: Maria Rodriguez
data.title: Associate Director - Structural Engineering
data.bio: Maria Rodriguez is an accomplished structural engineer specializing in high-rise buildings and complex structures. With a strong background in advanced structural analysis and seismic design, she has contributed to numerous landmark projects across North and South America. Maria is passionate about pushing the boundaries of structural engineering through innovative materials and design approaches.
achievements: Pioneered use of high-strength concrete in seismic zones
Published book on modern structural systems

data.name: David Thompson
data.title: Regional Director - Middle East
data.bio: David Thompson leads our Middle East operations, overseeing a diverse portfolio of infrastructure, buildings, and energy projects. With 30 years of international experience, he has built strong relationships with clients across the region and established our reputation for delivering excellence in challenging environments. David is committed to developing local talent and sustainable infrastructure solutions.
qualifications: MEng Civil Engineering, University of Edinburgh
achievements: Grew Middle East revenue to $200M annually
Delivered 50+ major projects across Gulf region
Established graduate training program for local engineers
Industry representative on UAE sustainability council

data.name: Aisha Patel
data.title: Director of Sustainability
data.bio: Aisha Patel leads our global sustainability practice, helping clients achieve net zero targets and build climate-resilient infrastructure. Her expertise spans carbon management, climate adaptation, and sustainable design across all sectors. Aisha is a frequent speaker on climate action and has advised governments and corporations on decarbonization strategies.

data.name: Robert Kim
data.title: Principal Engineer - Digital Engineering
data.bio: Robert Kim is a pioneer in digital engineering, specializing in BIM, digital twins, and AI applications for infrastructure. He leads our digital transformation initiatives, helping project teams leverage technology to improve design quality, collaboration, and asset performance. Robert's work has set new standards for digital delivery in the industry.
qualifications: BS Civil Engineering, Seoul National University
